name: runs
context: Monitor, trigger, and manage GitHub Actions workflow runs via gh run list/view/watch and the REST API
info: Manage workflow run lifecycle: list recent runs, view run details and logs, watch runs in real-time, trigger runs via workflow_dispatch, re-run failed jobs, and cancel in-progress runs. Use `gh run list`, `gh run view`, `gh run watch` for CLI interaction, or the REST API via @octokit/rest. Runs are created when [[github/actions/workflows]] are triggered. Check run status as required checks for [[github/pulls/merge]]. See [[github/auth]] for authentication and [[github/rate-limits]] for API quota.

sections.title: Listing runs
sections.body: Use `gh run list` or `octokit.actions.listWorkflowRuns()` to list runs filtered by workflow, status (completed/in_progress/queued), conclusion (success/failure), branch, and actor. Results are paginated. See [[github/pagination]] for traversal. Use `--json` with `gh` for structured output.

sections.title: Viewing run details and logs
sections.body: Use `gh run view <id>` for a summary or `--log` for full logs. `--log-failed` shows only failed job logs. The API provides `getWorkflowRun()` for run metadata and `listJobsForWorkflowRun()` for job-level details including step-by-step status. Download complete logs as a zip archive via `downloadWorkflowRunLogs()`.

sections.title: Triggering runs
sections.body: Use `gh workflow run <workflow>` or `octokit.actions.createWorkflowDispatch()` to trigger runs on workflows with `workflow_dispatch` triggers. Pass inputs via `-f key=value` (CLI) or `inputs` object (API). Specify the git ref (branch/tag/SHA) to run on. The workflow must have `on: workflow_dispatch` defined. See [[github/actions/workflows]].

sections.title: Re-running and cancelling
sections.body: Re-run failed jobs with `gh run rerun <id> --failed` or all jobs with `gh run rerun <id>`. Cancel in-progress runs with `gh run cancel <id>`. The API equivalents are `reRunWorkflowFailedJobs()`, `reRunWorkflow()`, and `cancelWorkflowRun()`. Re-runs use the same commit SHA and workflow definition.

links.context: Check run status on PR branches
